LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JONG SUH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
